# Visco Acoustic Medium

**Summary**: A medium where seismic waves experience both attenuation and dispersion.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-mohammed|Mohammed, 2015]] addressed the need to incorporate wave losses in visco-acoustic media in future work.

## Scientific Context

- [[2015-mohammed|Mohammed, 2015]] Real-world earth conditions involve attenuation that standard acoustic models ignore.
